title: Computational prediction of molecular mechanisms in migration
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iapcadn
materials: Visualize the signaling network with Cytoscape.

steps.title: Obtain the protein-protein interaction network (PPIN)...
steps.instruction: Obtain the protein-protein interaction network (PPIN) for Mus musculus from the STRING 10.0 database containing all known and predicted protein-protein interactions.

steps.title: Superimpose our previous mass spectrometry results...
steps.instruction: Superimpose our previous mass spectrometry results of the TMEM30A complex in mouse tissue and the known migration-related genes from the literature onto the PPIN from the STRING database.

steps.title: Extract the sub-network of these selected...
steps.instruction: Extract the sub-network of these selected proteins from the whole PPIN in STRING.

steps.title: Use DAVID to conduct the function and pathway enrichment analysis
steps.instruction: Use DAVID to conduct the function and pathway enrichment analysis.
